-- Time-constructible function: t(n) is time-constructible if it can be computed in time O(t(n))
def time_constructible (t : ℕ → ℕ) : Prop :=
  (∃ c, 0 < c) ∧
  (∀ n, ∃ M : ℕ → ℕ, M n = t n ∧
    (∃ t₀ : ℕ, t₀ > 0 ∧
     ∀ n, n ≥ t₀ → M n ≤ t n))
